trigger_conditions: SIS or student data unavailable due to attack
actions: ["Switch to paper attendance sheets kept in each classroom","Front office logs visitors manually","Use cell phone tree for parent communication","Escalate to SIS vendor and cyber insurance","Restore from backup-nas once cleared"]
notes: Paper attendance packets stored in each classroom emergency binder

trigger_conditions: Internet or core network down more than 2 hours
actions: ["Fail over to backup internet circuit","Office uses cell hotspots for critical email","Paper attendance until SIS reachable","Notify MSP NOC and ISP"]

trigger_conditions: Confirmed unauthorized access to student or staff PII
actions: ["Engage cyber insurance breach coach and district counsel","Preserve evidence","Scope affected records","Prepare FERPA and state notifications","Offer credit monitoring if financial data exposed"]

trigger_conditions: Tornado warning or winter storm forecast
actions: ["Superintendent decides early dismissal or shelter in place","Activate parent notification system","Hold students until guardians arrive if roads unsafe","Move to interior shelter zones if tornado warning"]
notes: Interior shelter zones: hallways A-D and library storage room
